content.problemStatement:
### **Aptitude Practice Question**

A square has a circle inscribed in it. If the side of the square is 14 cm, find the area of the shaded region (square - circle).

---

### **Answer & Explanation**

 Area of square = a2
                           = 14² = 196
 Radius of circle = 7
 Area of circle = πr2
                          =22/7 × 7 × 7 = 154
 Shaded area = 196 - 154 = 42 cm²
